message:
test: animation stress tests — reveal cap, hit-range gating, disable snap, focus flash (2dccg.9.4)

7 new tests validate animation performance guardrails: reveal springs
capped at MAX_ANIMATED_ITEMS for heavy result sets, hit-count gating
at min/max boundaries, disabled-animation snap behavior, focus flash
intensity returns zero when unfocused or disabled, and 200-hit render
with active animation completes without panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
